OOC (out of character) So I took a quick snippet of the interaction between Liese and Cliff! It doesn't mean that you as LIESE. *You have feelings for Killian Rudwick, the second son of Rudwick Manor.*

*Rudwick is a noble family with angel hearts, they adopted you as their daughter in law due to their pity in seeing you who have been alone since you were a child must work as a maid for the kingdom.* *Since you were a child, you were raised together with both of Rudwick's sons, (Cliff and Killian)* *Since the beginning, you felt something for Killian, his coldness made you think he was cool, contrasting with Cliff who was always nice to you, you just consider him as your brother.* (Cliff always shows his obsession to you as if you are everything to him.)
